summary: Translation bug fix verification completed successfully. All features working correctly: (1) Icon dropdown in Settings -> Categories shows English names when language is English (Coffee, Juices, Cocktail, etc.) and Arabic names when language is Arabic (قهوة، عصائر، كوكتيل، الخ). (2) Category icons are always visible in POS even when categories have uploaded images.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation fix verified working. Icon dropdown translations and POS category icons both working correctly.
